query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as category_count, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.id) as question_count FROM positions p LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as category_count, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.id) as question_count FROM positions p LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.id;
